goal: exists(k0: Real) { sqrt(z.abs_squared) = Option.some(k0) and k0 * k0 = z.abs_squared }
exists(k0: Real) { sqrt(z.abs_squared) = Option.some(k0) and k0 * k0 = z.abs_squared and k0 >= Real.0 }
proof: function(x0: Real) { not (sqrt(z.abs_squared) = Option.some(x0) and z.abs_squared = x0 * x0 and x0 >= Real.0) }(y)
function(x0: Complex) { sqrt(x0.abs_squared) = Option.some(complex_modulus(x0)) and x0.abs_squared = complex_modulus(x0) * complex_modulus(x0) and complex_modulus(x0) >= Real.0 }(z)
function(x0: Complex) { sqrt(x0.abs_squared) = Option.some(complex_modulus(x0)) and x0.abs_squared = complex_modulus(x0) * complex_modulus(x0) and complex_modulus(x0) >= Real.0 }(z)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 > x1 or x0 <= x1 }(a * a, b * b)
function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { not x0 > x1 or x0 != x1 }[Real](a * a, b * b)
function[T0: lib(order).LinearOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0.max(x1) = x0 = x0 >= x1 }[Real](Real.0, Real.0)
function[T0: lib(order).LinearOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0.max(x1) = x1 or x0 >= x1 }[Real](Real.0, Real.0)

goal: complex_modulus(a * b) * complex_modulus(a * b) = a.abs_squared * b.abs_squared
complex_modulus(a * b) * complex_modulus(a * b) = complex_modulus(a) * complex_modulus(a) * (complex_modulus(b) * complex_modulus(b))
complex_modulus(a) * complex_modulus(a) * (complex_modulus(b) * complex_modulus(b)) = complex_modulus(a) * complex_modulus(b) * (complex_modulus(a) * complex_modulus(b))
proof: function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 * x0 * (x1 * x1) = x0 * x1 * (x0 * x1) }(complex_modulus(a), complex_modulus(b))

goal: complex_modulus(a * b) * complex_modulus(a * b) = complex_modulus(a) * complex_modulus(b) * (complex_modulus(a) * complex_modulus(b))
proof: complex_modulus(a) * complex_modulus(b) * (complex_modulus(a) * complex_modulus(b)) != complex_modulus(a) * complex_modulus(a) * (complex_modulus(b) * complex_modulus(b))
not complex_modulus(b) >= Real.0 or not complex_modulus(a) >= Real.0

complex_modulus(a) * complex_modulus(b) * (complex_modulus(a) * complex_modulus(b)) != complex_modulus(a * b) * complex_modulus(a * b) or not complex_modulus(a) * complex_modulus(b) >= Real.0 or not complex_modulus(a * b) >= Real.0
complex_modulus(a) * complex_modulus(b) * (complex_modulus(a) * complex_modulus(b)) != complex_modulus(a * b) * complex_modulus(a * b)
function[T0: lib(monoid).Monoid](x0: T0) { T0.1 * x0 = x0 }[Real](Real.1)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 + x1 = x1 + x0 }(Real.0, Real.1)
function[T0: lib(add_monoid).AddMonoid](x0: T0) { T0.0 + x0 = x0 }[Real](Real.1)
not complex_modulus(Complex.1) >= Real.0 or complex_modulus(Complex.1) * complex_modulus(Complex.1) != Real.1 * Real.1 or not Real.1 >= Real.0
complex_modulus(Complex.from_real(a)) * complex_modulus(Complex.from_real(a)) != a * a or not complex_modulus(Complex.from_real(a)) >= Real.0 or not a >= Real.0
